title: The Missing Journalist
content: When a local journalist unexpectedly stopped answering messages, coworkers grew concerned. She had been investigating the history of an abandoned railway station and had promised to submit an article by Friday. After contacting friends and family, the newspaper finally received a call. Her phone battery had died while she was working in a remote village with poor signal coverage. She returned the following morning carrying detailed notes and dozens of photographs. Although everyone had imagined a complicated mystery, the explanation turned out to be remarkably ordinary.
